--- internal/auth/handler.go ---
package auth

import (
  "net/http"
  "time"
)

type Handler struct {
  svc *Service
}

func (h *Handler) ServeHTTP(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
  token := r.Header.Get("Authorization")
  if token == "" {
    http.Error(w, "missing token", 401)
    return
  }
  h.svc.Authorize(r)
}
